text: Competitor FinPay launched instant cross-border settlements in Q1 2026, targeting mid-market exporters.
Rival BankCo announced AI fraud detection for SMB accounts in March 2026 with 40% false-positive reduction.
PaySphere expanded Canadian payroll integrations and undercut incumbents on per-seat pricing.
NeoLedger raised Series C funding to build real-time AML monitoring for fintech APIs.
SwiftBridge partnered with three Canadian banks for same-day B2B payment rails in Q1 2026.
ClearAudit published a benchmark showing AI chargeback tools cut dispute resolution time by 55%.
